steps.t: Faeron did not return to the Stargazers' Spire with the others, so he must still be somewhere in the Circle of Madness. You should find Faeron!
Faeron has rescued Viznak, but the merrevail are in quick pursuit. You should return to the Barad Elenath and inform Rhadrog!
Faeron has rescued Viznak, but the merrevail are hot on their heels! You should inform Dolenthol!
Dolenthol is ready to help Faeron and Viznak. You should let Rhadrog know you are ready to go.
Viznak has survived the attack, and is now resting outside Barad Elenath. You should talk to Viznak.
Faeron has returned to Barad Elenath, the Stargazers' Spire. You should talk to Faeron.
